channel.title: Sangam Centre — Publications
channel.description: Research papers, policy briefs, and analytical reports from Sangam Centre for Culture and Public Policy.

item.title: When Modern Cities Forget Water
item.description: Abhishek Bharti examines how urban planning has disconnected modern cities from traditional water-management wisdom.
item.author: Abhishek Bharti

item.title: Cultural Intelligence and Inclusive Governance
item.description: Prof. Rana Prithviraj Singh and Suryaprakash explore how cultural intelligence informs inclusive governance models.
item.author: Prof. Rana Prithviraj Singh and Suryaprakash

item.title: A Pluralistic, Culturally-Rooted Environmental Governance Model
item.description: Saiyami and Abhishek Bharti present a model for environmental governance grounded in cultural pluralism.
item.author: Saiyami and Abhishek Bharti

item.title: Water Management — Swaraj International Conference
item.description: Subrat Tripathy's research presentation on water management at the Swaraj International Conference 2025.
item.author: Subrat Tripathy

item.title: Culture as the Soul of Public Policy
item.description: Prof. Rana Prithviraj Singh argues that culture must be at the centre of public policy design.
item.author: Prof. Rana Prithviraj Singh

item.title: Policy Analysis of SAMRUDHI
item.description: Shri Subrat Tripathy's policy analysis of the SAMRUDHI initiative.
item.author: Shri Subrat Tripathy
